rows.question: What is document/file 'OMR Answer Sheet' used for?
rows.answer: Candidate/school-specific or generic OMR answer sheet.
rows.build_instruction: Represent document omr_sheet in files/documents spec with mode=generated_or_uploaded, formats=pdf.
rows.test_instruction: Verify omr_sheet appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: Who uploads or generates 'OMR Answer Sheet'?
rows.test_instruction: Permission test verifies only operations_staff can create omr_sheet.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'OMR Answer Sheet'?
rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for omr_sheet: pdf.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for omr_sheet.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'OMR Answer Sheet'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for omr_sheet: restricted; Private; released only after gates; downloads audited.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies omr_sheet cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'OMR Answer Sheet'?
rows.answer: Private; released only after gates; downloads audited.
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for omr_sheet: Private; released only after gates; downloads audited.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for omr_sheet.

rows.question: What is document/file 'OMR Raw Scan Archive' used for?
rows.answer: Optional archive of scanned OMR images.
rows.build_instruction: Represent document omr_raw_scan_archive in files/documents spec with mode=uploaded, formats=zip,pdf,jpg,png.
rows.test_instruction: Verify omr_raw_scan_archive appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: Who uploads or generates 'OMR Raw Scan Archive'?
rows.test_instruction: Permission test verifies only operations_staff,evaluator can create omr_raw_scan_archive.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'OMR Raw Scan Archive'?
rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for omr_raw_scan_archive: zip,pdf,jpg,png.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for omr_raw_scan_archive.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'OMR Raw Scan Archive'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for omr_raw_scan_archive: restricted; Restricted; not visible to school unless formal review process exists.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies omr_raw_scan_archive cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'OMR Raw Scan Archive'?
rows.answer: Restricted; not visible to school unless formal review process exists.
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for omr_raw_scan_archive: Restricted; not visible to school unless formal review process exists.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for omr_raw_scan_archive.

rows.question: What is document/file 'OMR Result CSV' used for?
rows.answer: Output from OMRChecker or equivalent engine.
rows.build_instruction: Represent document omr_result_csv in files/documents spec with mode=uploaded, formats=csv.
rows.test_instruction: Verify omr_result_csv appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: Who uploads or generates 'OMR Result CSV'?
rows.test_instruction: Permission test verifies only evaluator can create omr_result_csv.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'OMR Result CSV'?
rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for omr_result_csv: csv.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for omr_result_csv.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'OMR Result CSV'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for omr_result_csv: restricted; Validated before results are created; never auto-published.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies omr_result_csv cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'OMR Result CSV'?
rows.answer: Validated before results are created; never auto-published.
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for omr_result_csv: Validated before results are created; never auto-published.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for omr_result_csv.
